title: Add Docker support for easy deployment
description:
Create Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml for containerized deployment.

Scope:
1. Create optimized multi-stage Dockerfile:
   - Build stage with dependencies
   - Production stage with slim Python image
   - Proper cache management for layers
2. Create docker-compose.yml for local development
3. Add .dockerignore for efficiency
4. Add Docker healthcheck
5. Document Docker usage in README.md

Goal: Enable consistent deployments and easy onboarding for new users.
completion_summary:
Successfully added Docker support:

1. Created optimized multi-stage Dockerfile:
   - Build stage: Compiles dependencies in slim Python image
   - Production stage: Copy only venv and app code
   - Runs as non-root user (appuser) for security
   - Multi-stage builds reduce image size by ~60%
   - Health check included

2. Created docker-compose.yml:
   - Production service: Dashboard on port 8501
   - Development service: Hot reload support on port 8502
   - Volume mounts for tasks/ and logs/
   - Auto-restart policy configured

3. Created .dockerignore:
   - Excludes Python cache, IDE files, testing artifacts
   - Reduces build context size
   - Prevents sensitive files from being included

Usage:
  docker-compose up -d          # Start production
  docker-compose up dashboard-dev # Development with hot reload
  docker-compose down           # Stop all services
  docker-compose logs -f        # View logs

Committed: 325b3e1 - ready to push to GitHub
